name: workspaces
description: Set up, audit, lint, extend, and operate WireNet-style knowledge-work workspaces.

interface.shortDescription: Set up, audit, lint, and extend Codex workspaces.
interface.longDescription: The Workspaces plugin provides modular Codex skills and deterministic helpers for setting up, auditing, linting, extending, and operating knowledge-work workspaces around identity, playbooks, sources, outputs, and reviews.
defaultPrompt: Use the workspace skill to set up this folder.
Audit this workspace with the workspace skill.
Lint this workspace and explain the findings.
